productContent.description:
The Palace Air Max 95 features Metallic Silver layers finished with a hand-sprayed black gradient. These metallic tones are balanced by baby blue accents and signature Palace branding is visible throughout, putting a hard-hitting spin on the iconic silhouette.


Benefits

  • Upper mixes synthetic leather and textiles for a layered look built to last.
  • Visible Max Air cushioning provides lightweight cushioning.
  • Flex grooves in the midsole/outsole let you move freely.

content.text: The NikeCraft GPS Bricolage is true to its name. Its elements derive from unexpected use. The sole? It looks like a waffle because it took a waffle iron to invent the running shoe. The Pine Green pullstraps? They’re cut down from high-performance automotive seat belts. The upper? It’s knit—with knots—not woven. It honors the knot-tying methods used by explorers to discover the world.
You can bricolage a sneaker, and you can bricolage your life. Gather your resources. Reimagine their potential. Recombine what you’ve found.
“Use your imagination to become who you want to be.”
This is the shoe you wear to pull it all together.

properties.body:

The Pine Green pullstraps? They’re cut down from high-performance automotive seat belts. The upper? It’s knit—with knots—not woven. It honors the knot-tying methods used by explorers to discover the world.
You can bricolage a sneaker, and you can bricolage your life. Gather your resources. Reimagine their potential. Recombine what you’ve found.
“Use your imagination to become who you want to be.”
This is the shoe you wear to pull it all together.

content.text: NikeCraft products are manufactured to the exact specifications of champion athletes throughout the world. The design and construction of NikeCraft products support all the activities of your life and tell your story. NikeCraft shuns innovation for its own sake, but embraces it as a necessity. Top quality products fulfill their intended purpose while remaining as hard-wearing as possible. Before recycling, there is reuse. Before reuse, there is durability.

properties.body: NikeCraft products are manufactured to the exact specifications of champion athletes throughout the world. The design and construction of NikeCraft products support all the activities of your life and tell your story. NikeCraft shuns innovation for its own sake, but embraces it as a necessity. Top quality products fulfill their intended purpose while remaining as hard-wearing as possible. Before recycling, there is reuse. Before reuse, there is durability.

productContent.fullTitle: NikeCraft General Purpose Shoe ‘Bricolage’ Shoes
productContent.title: NikeCraft General Purpose Shoe ‘Bricolage’
productContent.subtitle: Shoes
productContent.description:
The NikeCraft GPS Bricolage is true to its name. Its elements derive from unexpected use. The sole? It looks like a waffle because it took a waffle iron to invent the running shoe. The Pine Green pullstraps? They’re cut down from high-performance automotive seat belts. The upper? It’s knit—with knots—not woven. It honors the knot-tying methods used by explorers to discover the world.


Product Details

  • Durable knitted upper material (open enough to breath, tight enough to ward off a few raindrops)
  • 3-piece molded cup sole: Durable rubber outsole, soft gum rubber midsole and EVA foam core
  • Green nylon herringbone donning straps
  • Debossed “NIKE” logo in Tom Sachs’ handwriting on heel
  • Premium microfiber collar

A plush collar adds extra padding around the ankle, and a premium suede upper in Light Orewood Brown creates more flexibility to the fit. Hits of Pink Foam add subtle pops of color, and a Gum Light Brown outsole keeps the heritage look.

productContent.fullTitle: Nike SB Air Force 1 Skate Shoes
productContent.title: Nike SB Air Force 1
productContent.subtitle: Skate Shoes
productContent.description:
Comfortable, durable and timeless—it’s number one for a reason. The classic ‘80s construction pairs with bold details for style that tracks whether you’re on court or on the go.


Benefits

  • Leather upper with a perforated toe box is breathable and comfortable.
  • Originally designed for performance hoops, Nike Air cushioning adds lightweight, all-day comfort.
  • Rubber outsole with heritage hoops pivot circles delivers traction and durability.

Product Details

  • Padded collar

content.text: Caitlin Clark presents another Kobe 5 Protro player edition—this colorway first seen on-court in May of 2025. Recognizing her award-winning professional rookie season, a Metallic Silver upper gets paired with pops of University Red, and polished off with a high-gloss finish that glistens under the spotlight.

This Protro model takes a great basketball shoe and makes it better. It’s fitted with a flexible Air Zoom unit and scaled-down traction for optimal court feel. Plus, the minimally structured upper is lightweight and supportive all around.

properties.body:

Recognizing her award-winning professional rookie season, a Metallic Silver upper gets paired with pops of University Red, and polished off with a high-gloss finish that glistens under the spotlight.
This Protro model takes a great basketball shoe and makes it better. It’s fitted with a flexible Air Zoom unit and scaled-down traction for optimal court feel. Plus, the minimally structured upper is lightweight and supportive all around.

The dream goal you put in your phone to work toward. Show your love for all the numerals that instantly conjure up Mamba lore in this Dri-FIT tee.

Product Details

  • Machine wash
  • Imported

content.text: The Nike x LABELHOOD Shox Z Calistra draws on the beauty and craftsmanship of black pottery to create a dazzling shoe with understated depth. At first glance it's an invitation to see what makes this ballet flat special. Notice the molded patent leather upper with its subtle sheen, the floral detailing on the strap, the commanding bursts of University Red in the Shox columns. Imagine the ease with which you could slip into these elegant shoes, the places you could go, looking effortlessly chic all along the way.

content.text: Arriving during Kobe’s final season, the low-cut Kobe XI distilled his signature legacy to its essence: high performance, lightweight and sophisticated. The Kobe 11 Protro keeps the same ethos, but pushes it forward ten years after the original debut.

A black mesh upper is drenched in Metallic Gold numerology references. A ReactX drop-in midsole replaces the Lunarlon foam found in the original Kobe XI, and is combined with a heel Air Zoom unit to deliver responsive cushioning. On the exterior, the outsole features a revised tread pattern for premium traction and court feel.

productContent.fullTitle: Kobe XI EM Protro Basketball Shoes
productContent.title: Kobe XI EM Protro
productContent.subtitle: Basketball Shoes
productContent.description:
Arriving during Kobe’s final season, the low-cut Kobe 11 distilled his signature legacy to its essence: high performance, lightweight and sophisticated. The Kobe 11 Protro keeps those same ethos, but pushes them forward in true Mamba fashion. Kobe’s famed Flyknit upper is reinforced with TPU in targeted areas for strength while preserving minimal weight. The ReactX drop-in midsole combines with a heel Air Zoom unit, delivering flexibility and responsiveness. And the outsole features a game-breaking traction pattern, keeping with Kobe’s longstanding obsession with revolutionizing traction on the court.


Benefits

  • ReactX drop-in midsole offers optimal soft responsiveness
  • Heel Air Zoom unit provides bounce and stability
  • Herringbone traction pattern

content.text: A’ja runs the floor at full speed, all game. That’s why we made the A’Two even more responsive than her original. And this isn't just a sequel—it's the next level. Cushlon 3.0 foam provides optimal cushioning and responsiveness to help you sprint rim-to-rim. A snappy bottom-loaded Air Zoom unit in the forefoot gives your first step even more juice when attacking the hoop. As a nod to A’ja’s signature asymmetry, we added paneled ventilation to one side of the shoe for when the game heats up. If you’re ready to keep pace with the M’VP, go full force with soft cushioning that combines with powerful Air Zoom in an encore with extra oomph.
Please note: This shoe runs approximately half a size small. For your usual fit, consider ordering half a size up.

productContent.fullTitle: A'Two "A'Pink Shoe" A'ja Wilson Basketball Shoes
productContent.title: A'Two "A'Pink Shoe"
productContent.subtitle: A'ja Wilson Basketball Shoes
productContent.description:
A’ja runs the floor at full speed, all game. That’s why we made the A’Two more responsive than her original. If you’re ready to keep pace with the M’VP, go full force with soft cushioning that combines with powerful Air Zoom in an encore with extra oomph.


All Pink Everything

The A’One introduced A’ja to the globe. Now it’s time to show what follows. This A’Two takes her favorite pink color to a whole new level, drenching it in a statement-making shade that’s bright, bold and impossible to ignore. Touches of color shifting iridescent throughout put a stamp on the start of the A’Two journey.


Keep Running

Cushlon 3.0 foam provides optimal cushioning and responsiveness to help you sprint rim-to-rim. A soft layer of extra foam on top offers comfort and support.


Get it and Go

A snappy bottom-loaded Air Zoom unit in the forefoot gives your first step even more juice when attacking the hoop. A midfoot plate provides ample stability for dynamic movements.


Stop on a Dime

Our herringbone traction pattern helps you stop on a dime and shift gears on command. An injected molded heel counter stabilizes and contains your foot.


Lock In

The durable upper molds to your foot, keeping you locked in when you’re checking opponents defensively or blowing by them with the rock.


Let it Breathe

As a nod to A’ja’s signature asymmetry we added paneled ventilation to one side of the shoe for when the game heats up.

content.text: The benefits of Nike Mind technology in a comfortable, go-anywhere sneaker? Yeah, we did that. Plush and responsive foam cushions your every step while large outsole nodes push against your foot, engaging sensory areas of the brain to help you stay present and connect with your surroundings everywhere you go.

Developed in Nike's Mind Science Department, 22 nodes move up and down against your foot in a way that is scientifically shown to activate sensory areas of the brain. Soft foam in the midsole provides robust, comfortable cushioning. The knit upper features engineered perforations for breathability. Stretchy fabric on the footbed gives the nodes room to move while still feeling soft against your foot.

Plush and responsive foam cushions your every step while large outsole nodes push against your foot, engaging sensory areas of the brain to help you stay present and connect with your surroundings everywhere you go.


Activate Your Senses

Prep in Comfort

productContent.title: Air Jordan 11 Retro Low "University Blue"
productContent.subtitle: Big Kids' Shoes
productContent.description:
25 years since its initial release, the AJ11 still makes heads swivel. That icy outsole. Those patent leather mudguards. That crispy University Blue. A classic's a classic for a reason.


Benefits

  • Full-length Air-Sole unit delivers lightweight cushioning.

productContent.fullTitle: Air Jordan 5 Retro "Reimagined" Big Kids' Shoes
productContent.title: Air Jordan 5 Retro "Reimagined"
productContent.subtitle: Big Kids' Shoes
productContent.description:
The AJ5 is unmistakable. Fierce zig-zag details on the midsole, peekaboo mesh panels and iconic lace locks make for standout style. Velvety nubuck leather and metallic accents give this pair a premium look and feel.


Benefits

  • Real and synthetic leather works with textiles in the upper to offer durability and structure.
  • Plush and comfortable, Max Air cushioning has just the right amount of support.
  • Foam midsole helps add lightweight cushioning.
  • Rubber in the outsole helps provide durable traction.
  • Lace lock helps you secure your fit fast.

Product Details

  • Classic laces
  • 2 sets of laces
  • Foam midsole
  • Rubber outsole
